questionHtml:
What is the unit of electrical potential difference expressed in fundamental SI units?

A. kg m s-1 C-1

B. kg m2 s-2 C-1

C. kg m2 s-3 A-1

D. kg m2 s-1 A

meta.title: What is the unit of electrical potential difference expressed in fundamental SI units? A. kg m s-1 C-1 B. kg m2 s-2 C-1 C. kg m2 s-3 A-1 D. kg m2 s-1 A
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
